description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, test, release, staging, and production, using the docker:latest image and docker:dind service globally and a global before_script that logs in to the GitLab Container Registry with docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com. Add a build job in the build stage that runs `docker build --pull -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF .` and `docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF`, and excludes tag pipelines. Add test1 and test2 jobs in the test stage that each use the image `$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF`, have no before_script, run `echo "test1"` or `echo "test2"` respectively, and also skip tags. Add release-by-name (runs on non‑master branches) and release-master (runs only on master) jobs in the release stage that execute `docker pull $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF`, then `docker tag $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF_NAME` or `docker tag $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest`, and finally `docker push` the resulting tag. Add auto-deploy-master (staging, only on master) and auto-deploy-tags (production, only on tags) jobs that first run the gcloud setup commands `echo $GCLOUD_SERVICE_KEY | base64 --decode -i > ~/gcloud-service-key.json`, `gcloud auth activate-service-account --key-file ~/gcloud-service-key.json`, `gcloud --quiet container clusters get-credentials $CLOUDSDK_CONTAINER_CLUSTER`, then patch the respective Kubernetes deployment with `kubectl patch deployment $STAGING_SERVICE_NAME -p '{"spec":{"template":{"spec":{"containers":[{"name":"'$STAGING_SERVICE_NAME'","image":"'$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF'"}]}}}}'` or `kubectl patch deployment $PRODUCTION_SERVICE_NAME -p '{"spec":{"template":{"spec":{"containers":[{"name":"'$PRODUCTION_SERVICE_NAME'","image":"'$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF'"}]}}}}'` using the google/cloud-sdk image; also add manual deploy to staging and production jobs with the same gcloud steps, restricted to non‑master/non‑tag or master branches respectively.
